summary: Iteration 13 backend testing complete. 22/22 tests passed covering: (1) superadmin login + /auth/me role check, (2) full RBAC on /api/updates/* (401 unauth, 403 sub-admin with settings+seo perms, 200 superadmin), (3) update repo configured to GoDeskio/Executive-Distribution, /updates/check returns graceful 200 (repo empty → error field in body, no 500), (4) /updates/status shape verified with all required keys and no update_token leakage, (5) /settings hides update_token via has_update_token boolean, (6) /updates/apply on managed env returns {ok:false,managed:true,message:...} without attempting execution, (7) /updates/mark-current with no latest → {ok:false,error:...}, (8) audit CSV export superadmin returns text/csv + Content-Disposition attachment + correct header row, sub-admin gets 403, (9) audit list w/ entity+action filters works, (10) settings tagline persistence (PERSIST-TEST marker read-after-write), (11) regression: sub-admin without crm perm gets 403 on /clients, sitemap.xml + robots.txt valid, /seo/ping superadmin 200.
critical_code_review_comments: updater.fetch_latest uses synchronous requests wrapped in asyncio.to_thread — fine, but consider httpx.AsyncClient for consistency.
run_check on release-not-found path catches only exceptions; a non-200 release response silently falls through to the commits endpoint (intentional and correct).
audit_logs limit clamps between 1–500 in list endpoint but CSV export is hardcoded to 5000 — consider making CSV limit configurable / paged for large deployments.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted throwaway sub-admin TEST_subadmin_*@example.com with permissions [settings, seo]. Set update_repo_url to GoDeskio/Executive-Distribution (left as-is per user instruction). update_token set then cleared. Tagline restored to prior value via fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter13_updates_audit.py exercises the full update-notifier + audit CSV surface and is safe to re-run (all resources are cleaned up in fixtures). BASE_URL loader falls back to /app/frontend/.env if env var is missing. The GoDeskio repo is empty so /updates/check will always return an 'error' field in body — this is EXPECTED. If the repo is later populated, mark-current will return ok:true.
